definition: Any drought/water shortage, food-price, livestock death, flood, or crop/agricultural price shock reported.
Analytical proxy: FIES raw score >= 4 affirmative responses.

Any erosive/stress response including selling assets/land/livestock, removing children from school, borrowing from money lender, reducing food consumption, eating lower-cost foods, or reducing non-food expenditure.
Any response help from international organization, local NGO, or government.
Climate/livelihood shock + food insecurity or erosive coping + no formal support.
Posterior mean predicted probability from Bayesian hierarchical logistic model; household-level values excluded publicly.
Upper-bound benchmark score using direct post-impact need information.
